service.name: OpenAI Text-to-Speech API
service.description_for_ai: High-quality text-to-speech. 6 voices, fast generation. $15/1M chars. Natural sounding speech in many languages. Use for reading text aloud, voice assistants, audiobook narration.

capabilities.description_for_ai: High-quality text-to-speech. 6 voices, fast generation. $15/1M chars. Natural sounding speech in many languages. Use for reading text aloud, voice assistants, audiobook narration. Convert text to speech audio. Returns mp3 audio file. 6 natural voices available.

voice.description: alloy (neutral), echo (male), fable (british), onyx (deep), nova (female), shimmer (soft female)

response_format.description: mp3, opus, aac, flac, wav, pcm

agent_hints.voice_guide: alloy=neutral balanced, echo=male warm, fable=British accent, onyx=deep authoritative, nova=friendly female, shimmer=soft female
agent_hints.streaming: Response is streaming audio binary. For web: create Blob URL from response.
agent_hints.length: Max 4096 chars per request. Split longer text into chunks.
